rules.rule: Only store high-value reusable operational knowledge
Do not configure Windows auto-start without explicit user approval
Treat Windows paths as accessible through WSL path mapping
Treat D:\openclaw as the canonical OpenClaw home and workspace root

patterns.pattern: Check known startup sources before editing launch scripts again
Use fixed troubleshooting order for Xiaohongshu MCP

evaluation_rules: If startup-related noise returns, preserve only the conclusion and not the full transcript
If a workflow is fixed and repeatable, prefer strategy or meta over summary sprawl
